message:
feat(storage): expand SQLite storage with additional query methods and cache management

- Expand storage module with additional query methods for blocked-cache
  diagnostics, dependency graph traversal, and stale detection (+82 lines)
- Update Cargo.lock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

  "base64",
  "bincode-next",
